<!-- walkthrough_start -->

## Walkthrough

This PR introduces agent-rule injection for consumer repositories that integrate Son-of-Anton via `git subtree`. It adds AGENTS.soa.md and CLAUDE.soa.md documentation files defining skill triggers and operational review rules, implements an `inject_soa_block` shell function that uses HTML comment markers to inject these rules into consumer AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md files, and includes a comprehensive test suite validating creation, idempotency, content preservation, and status output. The cspell.json configuration is updated to whitelist "getline".

<!-- walkthrough_end -->

<!-- tips_start -->
